caption: Aggressive metalcore with harsh screaming vocals, heavy down-tuned guitars, crushing breakdowns, blast beat double bass drums, intense energy
lyrics:
[verse]
Broken chains and shattered glass
Nothing from the past will last
Fury builds inside my chest
Put your demons to the test

[chorus]
Break the walls — tear them down
Rise above — never drown
Fight through every single day
Never let them take you away

[verse]
Blood and sweat on every floor
I will not bend anymore
Every scar is proof I stand
Take my life into my hands

[chorus]
Break the walls — tear them down
Rise above — never drown
Fight through every single day
Never let them take you away

[bridge]
I AM THE STORM
I AM THE FIRE
I WILL NOT FALL
I AM THE IRON WIRE

[chorus]
Break the walls — tear them down
Rise above — never drown
Fight through every single day
Never let them take you away

[outro]
The silence after the storm
I am reborn
